text.title: Portfolio Strategy (70/20/10) Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed across deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 100% of engineering capacity on H1 maintenance; no H2/H3 work shipped this year.
antipattern.root-cause: No default allocation; deadline pressure consumed innovation budget.
antipattern.fix: Enforce 70/20/10 default; protect H2+H3 capacity from H1 pressure.

antipattern.symptom: H3 bet drags on 3 years; nobody can articulate the signal threshold to kill it.
antipattern.fix: Every H3 bet records signal + threshold + observation window at start; sunset if criteria triggered.

antipattern.symptom: On a bad-news quarter, H3 capacity drained into H1; never restored.
antipattern.root-cause: Macro re-allocation done on noise, not named indicators.
antipattern.fix: Quarterly macro review with named indicators (revenue growth, net cash, market index); intra-quarter shifts require named trigger.

antipattern.symptom: Allocator script reports 30% capacity 'unknown'; reports unreliable.
antipattern.fix: Tag every active bet H1/H2/H3 with rationale; untagged bets blocked from sprint kickoff.
